changesProposed.name: AST SpaceMobile

verified.name: AST SpaceMobile
verified.description: A publicly traded satellite designer and manufacturer building the SpaceMobile satellite constellation, a space-based cellular broadband network designed to connect directly to standard, unmodified smartphones to deliver 4G and 5G coverage globally.
verified.notes: Founded as AST & Science LLC in May 2017; became publicly traded via SPAC merger in April 2021 on Nasdaq under ticker ASTS. Website listed as ast-science.com on Wikipedia, though company website header shows astspacemobile.com.

changesProposed.name: Astrolab

verified.name: Astrolab
verified.description: A private American aerospace company that designs and develops robotic mobility systems for planetary exploration, including the FLEX rover for lunar and Mars surface logistics.
verified.notes: Source [0] (company website) describes a different business (consulting/AI services) and does not match the aerospace company. Source [1] (Wikipedia) is the authoritative source for Astrolab aerospace. Company officially registered as 'Venturi Astrolab Inc.' per Wikipedia. Selected by NASA for Lunar Terrain Vehicle Services (LTVS) program in 2024 to support Artemis missions.

changesProposed.name: Fervo Energy

verified.name: Fervo Energy
verified.description: Geothermal energy company generating electricity through enhanced geothermal systems (EGS) using horizontal drilling techniques. Operates Project Red demonstration plant in Nevada and develops Cape Station greenfield project in Utah.
verified.notes: Company went public on May 17, 2026 (per website newsroom). Wikipedia shows company status as 'Private' but website confirms IPO with article titled 'A Start-Up Aiming to Make Geothermal Energy Mainstream Goes Public' dated May 17, 2026 and 'Fervo Energy raises $1.89B in IPO: CEO on the company's Nasdaq debut'. Total funding exceeds $1.89B IPO as additional $462M Series E received November 2025 per Wikipedia.

changesProposed.name: Nuro

verified.name: Nuro
verified.description: Autonomous vehicle technology company that initially developed custom autonomous delivery vehicles and has pivoted to licensing its Level 4 driving system, Nuro Driver, to automakers and mobility providers.
verified.notes: Company pivoted from autonomous delivery vehicles to licensing business model in September 2024. Series E funding closed in August 2025 at $203M valuation of $6B. Partnership with Uber and Lucid Motors announced July 2025 for robotaxi deployment of 20,000+ vehicles.

changesProposed.name: SpaceX

verified.name: SpaceX
verified.description: American aerospace and artificial intelligence company that develops rockets, spacecraft, and satellite constellations. Founded by Elon Musk in 2002, SpaceX operates the Falcon 9 rocket and Dragon capsules for cargo and crewed missions, and operates the Starlink satellite internet constellation.

Database claims about 165 Falcon 9 launches in 2025, 81% of mass to orbit, 9M+ Starlink customers, and $1.5T valuation cannot be verified from provided sources.
